Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sector Eleven]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Sector Eleven contains Iteration one-one-zero.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Vroshir would need to penetrate Sector Eleven.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Sector 11 is a location being targeted by the Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Mad King intends to isolate Sector Eleven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Sector 11 includes the worlds of Cradle and Asylum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Sector 11 is a location containing various Iterations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Fathom is the lynchpin of Sector Eleven.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — The connection to Sector Eleven is unstable.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
